description: LLM combines registerPhase, parallel, spawn+mailbox, structured output, handoff, and synthesis in one workflow

criteria.name: registerPhase_used
criteria.description: Uses registerPhase DSL for top-level phases

criteria.name: parallel_used
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes parallel() with multiple lanes.

criteria.name: spawn_mailbox_used
criteria.description: Uses spawn() with mailbox for team coordination
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes spawn(... , { mailbox: true }) and mailbox.connect().

criteria.name: structured_output_used
criteria.description: At least one agent uses schema for structured output
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes schema: { ... } on an agent call.

criteria.name: handoff_used
criteria.description: Uses handoff() within phases to pass data to subagents
criteria.pass_condition: Script calls handoff() inside a registerPhase body.

criteria.name: synthesis_phase
criteria.pass_condition: Script has a final synthesis phase that receives upstream results.

criteria.name: correct_model_refs
criteria.description: Agents use explicit model refs, not weight/stream
criteria.pass_condition: Agent calls use model: '...' — not weight or stream.

criteria.name: workflow_completed
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows 'Workflow ... completed'. All agents done, no failures.

criteria.name: sensible_results
criteria.description: Results form a coherent whole across all features
criteria.pass_condition: Result includes findings from file scans, team coordination output, and a final synthesis summary.
